title: python3.12-pip bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[23.2.1-5]
- Fix Bash completion
Resolves: RHEL-99083

[23.2.1-4]
- Use tarfile.data_filter for extracting (CVE-2007-4559, PEP-721, PEP-706)
Resolves: RHEL-25737

[23.2.1-3]
- Don't RPM Provide pip
- Remove a superfluous RPM Conflict with python-pip
- Allows to install python3.12-pip together with python3-pip

[23.2.1-2]
- Rebuilt for timestamp .pyc invalidation mode

[23.2.1-1]
- Initial package

full_text:
[23.2.1-5]
- Fix Bash completion
Resolves: RHEL-99083

[23.2.1-4]
- Use tarfile.data_filter for extracting (CVE-2007-4559, PEP-721, PEP-706)
Resolves: RHEL-25737

[23.2.1-3]
- Don't RPM Provide pip
- Remove a superfluous RPM Conflict with python-pip
- Allows to install python3.12-pip together with python3-pip

[23.2.1-2]
- Rebuilt for timestamp .pyc invalidation mode

[23.2.1-1]
